content:
# elizaos-plugins/registry Daily Update (Apr 17, 2026)

## OVERVIEW 
The elizaos-plugins/registry repository saw activity focused on expanding the ecosystem through the submission of two new plugin integrations. No code changes, bug fixes, or documentation updates were merged during this period.

## KEY TECHNICAL DEVELOPMENTS
*   **Plugin Registry Expansion**
    *   The registry received submissions to include new community plugins, specifically targeting the addition of `@thecolony/elizaos-plugin` and `megalaunch-elizaos-plugin`.

## NEWLY OPENED PULL REQUESTS
*   [#344](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/344): Add @thecolony/elizaos-plugin to registry.
*   [#343](https://github.com/elizaos-plugins/registry/pull/343): Add megalaunch-elizaos-plugin.

## CLOSED ISSUES
*   None.

## NEW ISSUES
*   None.

## ACTIVE ISSUES
*   None.
